optionA.text: Cephalic veil marginally liso, scaphe no distinctly separado from abdomen

optionB.text: Cephalic veil marginally cirrado; scaphe distinctly set off from abdomen

optionA.text: Twelve uncinigers, cephalic veil at least partly fusionado to opérculo

optionB.text: Thirteen uncinigers, cephalic veil completamente free from opérculo

optionA.text: Uncini con major dientes en una sola row

optionB.text: Uncini con major dientes en dos rows
